spec_match.rationale: Accurately details container size limits and item flow, comparing static 280px width blocks alongside a dynamic live resize field.

interactive.rationale: Combines standard drag borders (resize: horizontal), range input sliders, and mode-toggle buttons in one responsive layout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly highlights why developer profile tags wrapper blocks suffer from uneven balance.

edge_cases.rationale: Addresses container size changes from narrow (220px) to wide (720px) layout dimensions.

references.rationale: Correctly embeds the ChromeStatus milestones anchor link.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard border-black frames, flat-shadow drops, and clean profile grids from public/styles.css.

summary: The skill-badges concept is a high-quality layout exercise featuring drag-to-resize borders and dynamic flex modes.
